events.name: THROTTLE_ON
events.description: Throttle held down (keyboard keyUp/Down or d-pad press/release)

events.name: GAME_END
events.description: Called when the lap race ends

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Emits UI:{playAgainEvent} with {} on play again / reset

overridableConfigKeys.label: Acceleration
overridableConfigKeys.description: Speed gained per tick while the throttle is held

overridableConfigKeys.label: Brake Deceleration
overridableConfigKeys.description: Speed lost per tick while braking

overridableConfigKeys.label: Checkpoints
overridableConfigKeys.description: 8 gates around the oval, passed in order; a full lap = passing all 8.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Checkpoint Radius Squared
overridableConfigKeys.description: Squared grid distance within which a checkpoint counts as passed

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Start arch on the line, 2 grandstands outside the oval and 2 pit buildings in the infield.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Friction
overridableConfigKeys.description: Speed multiplier per tick while coasting

overridableConfigKeys.label: Max Speed
overridableConfigKeys.description: Top speed in grid cells per physics tick

overridableConfigKeys.label: Rival Speed
overridableConfigKeys.description: Rival car speed in grid cells per rival tick

overridableConfigKeys.label: Road Asset
overridableConfigKeys.description: Track tile model, tiled along the oval band

overridableConfigKeys.label: Total Laps
overridableConfigKeys.description: Laps around the circuit required to win

overridableConfigKeys.label: Turn Rate
overridableConfigKeys.description: Radians the heading turns per tick while steering and moving

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: Player race car + 1 rival race car at the start line.

paramsSchema.description: Typed params for ui-racing-board-3d / RacingBoard3DOrbital. Empty {} = factory defaults.

entityName.description: PascalCase singular entity rename (e.g. "Listing", "Member"). Renames the DOMAIN concept and rewrites every `@Entity.*` reference. Use this when the user wants to rename the THING, not where it's stored.

pagePath.description: URL path override for the orbital's first page.

fields.description: Extra entity fields appended to the canonical entity. Caller wins on name collision.

relation.description: Relation target. `cardinality: "one"` for FK (customerId → one Customer); "many" for collection (tags → many Tag).

traitOverrides.description: Per-trait knob overrides keyed on the canonical trait name. Each value can include `config` (knob values), `linkedEntity` (rebind), `events` (per-key rename map), `listens` (cross-orbital subscriptions), `emitsScope` (`internal` keeps emits local; `external` lets sibling orbitals listen), and `name` (rename the inlined trait). Only the traits + knobs shown here are valid — the schema rejects unknown keys.

accel.description: Speed gained per tick while the throttle is held

brakeDecel.description: Speed lost per tick while braking

checkpoints.description: 8 gates around the oval, passed in order; a full lap = passing all 8.

cpRadiusSq.description: Squared grid distance within which a checkpoint counts as passed

features.description: Start arch on the line, 2 grandstands outside the oval and 2 pit buildings in the infield.

friction.description: Speed multiplier per tick while coasting

maxSpeed.description: Top speed in grid cells per physics tick

rivalSpeed.description: Rival car speed in grid cells per rival tick

roadAsset.description: Track tile model, tiled along the oval band

totalLaps.description: Laps around the circuit required to win

turnRate.description: Radians the heading turns per tick while steering and moving

units.description: Player race car + 1 rival race car at the start line.

linkedEntity.description: Rebind this trait to a different entity in the organism (rewrites every @entity.* / ref / fetch / persist binding inside it).

name.description: Rename the inlined trait at the call site. Does NOT change topology — just the trait's local name.

events.description: Per-key event rename map (e.g. `{ "OPEN": "ADD_ITEM" }`). Rewrites the events array, transition triggers, emit/listen event keys, and `["emit", X]` SExpression literals inside the trait.

event.description: Event key to subscribe to (bare name, no orbital prefix).

triggers.description: Local state-machine event fired when the subscription matches.

scope.description: `internal` = same-orbital events. `external` = events from sibling orbitals (use this for cross-orbital reactivity).

listens.description: Replace this trait's `listens` entirely. Empty array clears upstream listeners. For cross-orbital reactivity, add an entry with `scope: "external"` matching the source orbital's emit event.

emitsScope.description: `internal` = emits stay local to this orbital. `external` = sibling orbitals can listen. Set to `external` when another orbital needs to react to this trait's events (counter updates, list refreshes, badges, etc.).

extraTraits.description: Sibling traits to compose beyond the factory-authored stack.

name.description: Optional rename of the inlined trait.

pages.description: Per-page overrides keyed by canonical page name.

name.description: Canonical page name from the orbital.
